title: Cubeworld
body:
![Hero Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EaC6XYN9/images/aeb250feb31f1675fca6b9a79831ffb3eda109f6.png)

Amusement park resource pack for Cubeworld on the public Cubekrowd server.  
Provides themed assets for rides, minigames, and park zones.

Content  
• Custom banners, signage, and wayfinding  
• Custom food items and consumables  
• Decorative props and trophies  
• Currency items (Cubekoins)  
• Area specific models and textures  
• Uses lore based predicates (no global texture overrides)

Purpose  
• Improve visual fidelity of park activities  
• Increase immersion during gameplay  
• Support new attractions as Cubeworld expands

Appeal  
• Multiplayer compatible on Cubekrowd public server  
• Does not affect unrelated builds  
• Continuously updated with new zones and assets
